item.title: As usual, Weird Al being awesome.

item.title: In 2020, Dr. Brown was surprised by his students during their final Zoom class. Each student turned on their camera holding handwritten signs thanking him for his kindness, energy, and support throughout the semester.
item.description: He was teaching a freshman foundation course: The Lies You Learned in High School!
item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: Kash in 2023: "I'm just saying Chris Wray doesn't need a government funded G5 jet to go to vacations. Maybe we ground that plane. $15,000 every time it takes off. Just a thought.” – Kash in 2026:
item.description: ICYMI – The FBI director flew there on the taxpayer dime on a private jet to do this.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Carol Leonnig MSNOW Sr. Investigative Reporter: FBI Dir. Kash Patel flew on the FBI's Gulfstream jet to the winter Olympics in Italy to watch one of his favorite sports: men's ice hockey, according to three people familiar with his plans.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.25 LESSER GODS
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Ihor Khomsky
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Little Creatures - Jade Cicada YouTube: https://youtu.be/jeHruiaJg3Y?si=pbwCtCuB9qTxloE1 Spotify:https://open.spotify.com/track/3YP6BTKcLF1OSctWzJRCdu?si=d6351a4decd24a82
Bender Bones
Butcher Billy
Jiunn Kuo
Akim K
classic vandal / Ludwig Passini
InHyuk Lee
Bender Bones
Insist
Sangsoo Jeong
hellentattoo777
Sung Eun Kim
VIK3DFIGURES
Chloe Veillard
Guillaume Normand
Bender Bones
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: FREEDOM HOUSE
item.description:
Communicator is Dr Joel Bervell, a mastermind medical mythbuster specializing in misdiagnosis of patients of color. Scene is from The Pitt, season 1. Freedom House also pioneered the 911 system to call and respond with medical services within communities unserved by white hospitals.
We are proposing to award a congressional Gold Medal to these paramedics. Justice is progress
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1623 (ice cream)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. Third time trying to add text to this post, let's see if it crashes out.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Love you too!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @Zinfandella made this and I think it's great!
27 Man Tax: Jim Morrison
“You can only be young once but you can be immature forever.” - Dave Barry So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me Had a mix-up with my folder, so if there are a couple repeats from recent posts, sorry!
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator
